prompt: change the word 'reflection' in a way that it can be read from a mirror
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. On the store sign 'NORTHERN REFLECTIONS' visible above the entrance, modify the word 'REFLECTIONS'. Replace it with a horizontally flipped version of the text, so that it appears correctly readable when viewed in a mirror. Use image 2 as the mask to apply these changes specifically to the sign area.
objects: The word "REFLECTIONS" on the sign (should not be present)
A horizontally flipped version of the word "REFLECTIONS" on the sign
